calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Hillary Lipsky, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ruth Gumnit.
Default was entered against defendant on May 17, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Ruth Gumnit as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,503.87.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,821.89.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $444.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $32,770.26.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
